name: claim-analyse-root
description: Root management for ClaimAnalyse insurance analyzer

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd apps/web && npm install && cd ../api && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.web:migrate: cd apps/web && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:all: npm run db:setup && npm run web:migrate
scripts.prisma:seed: cd apps/web && npx prisma db seed
scripts.prod:install:all: npm install && cd apps/web && npm install && cd ../api && ../../.venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.prod:db:setup: npm run prod:db:migrate && npm run prod:db:seed
scripts.prod:db:all: npm run prod:db:setup && npm run prod:web:migrate
scripts.prod:build:web: cd apps/web && npm run prisma:generate && npm run build
scripts.prod:build: npm run prod:build:api && npm run prod:build:web
